task.title: Add phase-file generator for large reviews and implementations.

context.problem_statement: Large reviews and implementations need phase files so fresh agent sessions can resume a bounded phase without reconstructing the whole plan.
background: AGW-054 established source task-packet prompt, template, and schema surfaces.
AGW-055 is prompt/template-first source work for agent-workflow-kit, not an installed repo-contract-kit command.
Current backlog status is 4 open, 97 done, 0 partial; AGW-055 is the next open item.
Current source checkout is clean before this packet is written, and agent-task-status reports zero active tasks and no coordination warnings.
non_goals: Do not add a hosted planning service, backlog UI, or external memory adapter.
Do not change repo-contract-kit installed target commands unless source prompt changes expose a strictly necessary generated adapter sync.
Do not implement GitHub, Reddit, BMAD, Keryx, Obsidian, or issue-tracker integration in this slice.
Do not replace the existing task-packet contract; add phase-file guidance as an extension for large work.

report_sources: repo-contract-kit AGW-053 validation and Codex_CodeReview closeout commits
finalizer_receipt_paths: Codex_CodeReview commit 35da7a8 closes AGW-053 source state
previous_task_state.notes: AGW-055 may start after this packet commit; no active sibling tasks or dirty source files were reported before packet creation.

closeout_required_before_start.reason: Prior AGW-053 work is committed in both repo-contract-kit and Codex_CodeReview, kit-status is current, and task-status reports no active tasks.
closeout_required_before_start.required_next_step: Commit this AGW-055 packet, then implement only the scoped source prompt/template/schema/docs work.

goal_alignment.repo_goal: agent-workflow-kit is the canonical local-first workflow prompt source; repo-contract-kit is only the install layer.

area_contracts.purpose: Canonical workflow prompt source for task-packet and implementation handoffs.
Machine-readable contracts for source workflow artifacts.
area_contracts.notes: Schema changes are allowed if phase-file metadata needs structured validation.

area_contracts.purpose: Repository documentation, runbooks, decisions, and operator-facing guidance.
area_contracts.notes: Docs must explain when to use phase files and how they relate to task packets.

stop_conditions: Stop before implementation if the scope turns into an installed repo-contract-kit command rather than source prompt/template guidance.
Stop before implementation if phase files require a new external planning adapter or hosted service.
Stop before implementation if generated adapters cannot be synced from workflows/prompts.

protected_files: repo-contract-kit checkout unless a separate source/install-layer task is accepted
runtime credentials, external planning accounts, Keryx/Obsidian vault writes, GitHub issues, and hosted PR state
.doc-contract-kit/updates/ proposal artifacts unless reviewing kit update conflicts is explicitly in scope
expected_outputs: Task-packet prompt/template guidance for splitting large reviews or implementations into phase files.
Optional schema fields or examples for phase files if needed by validation.
Generated Codex and Copilot adapters synced from workflows/prompts.
Docs explaining phase-file lifecycle, handoff rules, and non-goals.
Backlog and summary closeout only after validation passes.

acceptance_criteria.description: Task-packet guidance defines when large reviews or implementations should be split into phase files.
acceptance_criteria.verification: Review workflows/prompts/task-packet.md and workflows/prompts/templates/task-packet.md for explicit phase-file trigger, fields, and handoff rules.

acceptance_criteria.description: Phase files preserve fresh-session continuity without replacing task packets or allowing unbounded mega-plans.
acceptance_criteria.verification: Docs and prompts state that one task packet remains the executable scope and phase files are bounded continuation artifacts.

acceptance_criteria.description: Implementation/fix and verification prompts know how to consume phase files when present.
acceptance_criteria.verification: Review workflows/prompts/fix-implementer.md, fix-planner.md, and verification-sentinel.md or document why each does not need changes.

acceptance_criteria.description: Generated adapters are refreshed after source prompt edits.
acceptance_criteria.verification: Run make prompt-adapters-export and make prompt-adapters-check.

acceptance_criteria.description: Tests or fixture checks cover the phase-file contract.
acceptance_criteria.verification: Run the focused task-packet/export tests plus make agent-verify.

commands.expected_result: generated Codex and Copilot adapters are synchronized from workflows/prompts
focused source prompt/schema adapter tests pass
docs contract and freshness checks pass

readiness_check.command: make agent-task-ready TASK=AGW-055 TASK_READY_JSON=1 or record why unavailable
readiness_check.expected_result: readiness passes or a blocker is recorded before handoff

lifecycle_action.command: make agent-task-finalize TASK=AGW-055 TASK_RECEIPT=.agent-workflows/tasks/AGW-055/receipt.json TASK_FINALIZE_JSON=1 or durable fallback receipt
lifecycle_action.expected_result: task metadata is terminal and final receipt is linked, or fallback receipt is documented

final_task_status.expected_result: terminal task state, receipt path, and active overlaps are visible or unavailable state is explained

closeout_preview.expected_result: eligible, retained, or blocked cleanup state is recorded

closeout_requirements.dirty_state_explanation: Final handoff must state whether the checkout is clean, contains only expected AGW-055 changes, or preserves unrelated dirt.

docs_impact.notes: Prompt/template behavior changes require docs and changelog updates.

known_risks: Phase files could become a second task-packet format if boundaries are unclear.
Adapters can drift if generated outputs are not refreshed.
Schema changes can break existing task-packet validation if not backward compatible.
Overly broad phase guidance could encourage large unbounded implementations.
stop_conditions: Stop if phase-file generation requires external planning or memory service integration.
Stop if the implementation needs repo-contract-kit installed command changes.
Stop if schema migration would invalidate existing checked-in task packets.

approval.notes: User requested task packets and serial implementation for every backlog item.

token_budget.notes: Implementation should run make agent-token-budget if prompt footprint changes materially.

handoff.next_packet_hint: Keep external planning and memory adapter examples separate for AGW-059.
